commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces the managed Codex login runner’s blocking timeout wait with termination-handler-based timeout handling, adds deterministic runner/coordinator regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can remain scoped around a blocking waitUntilExit() child after the timeout task fires, and the PR adds a deterministic fake-binary test for that path.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed because the owner-authored PR has no actionable review finding from this pass.

target.title: fix: time out stalled managed Codex login
target.body:
## Summary
- time out stalled managed `codex login` processes instead of waiting forever on `waitUntilExit`
- clear managed-account in-flight state when a login timeout fails
- add fake-binary and coordinator regression coverage for #1330

Fixes #1330.

## Tests
- `swift test --filter CodexLoginRunnerTests`
- `swift test --filter ManagedCodexAccountCoordinatorTests`
- `swift test --filter CodexAccountsSettingsSectionTests`
- `swift test --filter SubprocessRunnerTests`
- `git diff --check`
- `make check`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

Verification images: not applicable; process timeout/state regression covered by deterministic tests.
target.author: steipete
